title: ChestShopRestock
description: Lets players dump their inventory into their ChestShops with a simple command!
body: # ChestShopRestock With this [ChestShop](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chestshop) addon, can dump their inventory into their matching chestshops with /restock. ## Commands ### /restock * Empties your inventory into your chestshops. * Requires `chestshoprestock.command.restock` * If you want this command to restock into shops in unloaded chunks, you should also give players the permission `chestshoprestock.command.restock.loadchunks` ### /csrestock reload * Reloads the lang file. * Requires `chestshoprestock.command.reload` ## Usage Stats See more stats here.
